overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long CIEN Daily ETF (CIEG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Ciena Corporation (NYSE: CIEN) stock, less fees, and expenses. CIENprovides networking systems, software, and services that enable high-capacity optical and data networking for telecom carriers, cloud providers, and large enterprises. CIEG was launched on May 12, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
